stemHtml: SERA Regulation (EU) No 923/2012 establishes (1) _____ and operational provisions for air navigation. It applies to aircraft in general air traffic, the competent authorities of (2) _____, aerodrome operators, and ground personnel.

options.a: (1) common rules of the air; (2) EU Member States, air navigation service providers.
options.b: (1) common rules of the air; (2) ICAO Contracting States, SAR providers.
options.c: (1) EU-specific rules of the air; (2) EU Member States, military authorities.
options.d: (1) EU-specific rules of the air; (2) ICAO Contracting States, certification authorities.
